case_title: EHRHART, BENJAMIN RUSSELL VS HO, RICKY

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HO, RICKY
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF
BENJAMIN R. EHRHART'S PAPERWORK CALLED: "APPEARANCE BY AFFIDAVIT DUE TO HARDSHIP" (SUBMITTED TO DEPT. 506 FOR 6/1/06 1:30PM)
DEC. 1, 2005 THROUGH DEC. 15, 2005 IN THE SUM OF $550. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,650.00 FILED BY EHRHART, BENJAMIN RUSSELL AS TO DEFENDANT HO, RICKY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-01-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EHRHART, BENJAMIN RUSSELL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HO, RICKY $2,193.85 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,308.85, THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT DID NOT COMPLY WITH THE PROVISIONS OF CIVIL CODE 1950.5, AND PLAINTIFF IS THEREFORE ENTITLED TO THE RETURN OF SECURITY DEPOSIT OF $2200, PLUS INTEREST OF $43.85. THE COURT AWARDS STATUTORY PENALTIES PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE 1950.5 IN THE SUM OF $500. THE COURT APPLIES AN EQUITABLE OFF SET FOR RENT FOR THE PERIOD OF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
JUDGEMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS FILED. COPY GIVEN TO ACCOUNTING.
